reviews.comment:
La estación está en Firmat sobre la ruta 33, es una estación chica, con muñeco del ACA y un parque de una hectárea maravilloso detrás
Todo está impecable, inclusive el parque, que está cerrado al público
No es posible parar a descansar, porque no abren el portón bajo ningún concepto
Una lastima

(Translated by Google)
The station is in Firmat on Route 33. It's a small station with an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) statue and a wonderful one-hectare park behind it. Everything is immaculate, including the park, which is closed to the public. It's impossible to stop and rest because they won't open the gate under any circumstances. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4457450818126724539/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNVlhbzVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La señora Mirta que atiende el shop es lo más dulce que existe; me hizo un sándwich, porque soy vegetariana, para que no compre uno de los envasados♥️

(Translated by Google)
Mrs. Mirta, who runs the shop, is the sweetest person ever; she made me a sandwich, because I'm vegetarian, so I wouldn't have to buy one of the packaged ones ♥️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4457450818126724539/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteDlfZXBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros y de las señoras que atienden el bar es de mil maravillas. Y quiero destacar la excelente onda y carisma de la señora Mirta.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants and the ladies who run the bar is absolutely wonderful. And I want to highlight the excellent attitude and charisma of Mrs. Mirta.
